holdings.infoBox: DRAM is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 17.29%, United States Treasury Bill 07/14/2026 at 14.63%, MICRON TECHNOLOGY INC SWAP NM at 12.87%, Samsung Electronics at 12.38%, and MICRON TECHNOLOGY, INC.-SWAP-GOLD-L at 11.85%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF, providing exposure to global equity securities of memory companies through stocks and derivatives.  The fund uses a proprietary selection process based on market share and revenue tied to the industry DRAM was launched on Apr 2, 2026 and is issued by Roundhill.
